zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Créquy II於1299年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛時，他的父親Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard34歲，母親Marguerite de Beauvais30歲。他和Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1349年在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Créquy II于1299年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛时，他的父亲Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard34岁，母亲Marguerite de Beauvais30岁。他和Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1349年在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Créquy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucienne, Renold, Romain.  Spanish Alejandro, Eduardo, Beatriz, Juana, Mario, Porfirio.

Altered form of northern French Crequi: variant of Créquy, a habitational name from Créquy, a place in Pas-de-Calais, so named from Kreko, a personal name of ancient Germanic origin, + the suffix -iacum.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Créquy II was born in 1299, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard, was 34 and his mother, Marguerite de Beauvais, was 30. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny. He died in 1349, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Créquy II est né en 1299, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Beauvais, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny. Il est décédé en 1349, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Créquy II 1299 in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard 34 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Beauvais 30. Er hatte mit Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1349 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Créquy II è nato il nel 1299 nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Beauvais, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny. Morì nel 1349, nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Créquy IIが1299年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンで生まれた時，父Jean I De CREQUY L'étandardは34歳，母Marguerite de Beauvaisは30歳であった。彼はMarie Jeanne de  Picquignyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1349年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Créquy II(이)가 1299년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Beauvais(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Créquy II nasceu em 1299, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Beauvais, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny. Ele faleceu em 1349, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Créquy II родился в 1299 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Beauvais, 30. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny. Он умер в 1349 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Créquy II nació en 1299, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jean I De CREQUY L'étandard, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Beauvais, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Marie Jeanne de  Picquigny. Murió en 1349, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
